karnatakaDetail: Free travel for all women on KSRTC buses. ~1.3 crore daily riders.
telanganaDetail: Free travel for all women on TSRTC buses. ~35 lakh daily riders.

karnatakaDetail: 200 units free per household. ~1.7 crore households covered.
telanganaDetail: 200 units free per household. 42.25 lakh households covered; 2.50 lakh eligible still billed.

karnatakaDetail: 10 kg free rice per BPL family per month.
telanganaDetail: Rice at Rs 1/kg through PDS (carried forward from BRS era).

karnatakaStatus: Implemented — Rs 2,000/month to women heads of household
karnatakaDetail: ~1.2 crore women receiving Rs 2,000/month. Cost: ~Rs 28,800 crore/year.
telanganaDetail: Promised Rs 2,500/month. No registration portal, no pilot, no disbursements. Estimated annual cost: ~Rs 50,000 crore.

telanganaStatus: Not started — Deputy CM denied promise exists
karnatakaDetail: Monthly allowance for unemployed graduates. Active disbursement since launch.
telanganaDetail: Promised Rs 4,000/month for unemployed youth. Zero implementation. Deputy CM publicly denied the promise was ever made.

telanganaStatus: Partial — Rs 12,000 delivered (not Rs 15,000), waiver 50% done
karnatakaDetail: Crop loan waiver up to Rs 3 lakh. Partial delivery with similar beneficiary identification issues.
telanganaDetail: Rs 12,000/acre delivered vs Rs 15,000 promised (20% shortfall). Loan waiver: 25 lakh of 50 lakh target.
